title: The Obsessed - Advanced Psychological Horror, Arachnid Stalker
description: It stalks you with deranged fascination, each encounter driving its nightmarish obsession further…
body:
![the_obsessed_title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c91616e5b07164add10079b6dfaa36ac328e006.png)


Welcome to The Obsessed. 

A mod by Vllax, the creator of Arthropod Phobia Expansions, with original direction from IDK Someguy. 



The Obsessed is a mysterious entity defined by one thing: it finds you fascinating, but in a way that is twisted and dangerous. Though it may initially seem friendly, its mood can shift without warning, and when it does, it will make your life a living nightmare. It hides many secrets that will be revealed in coming updates...

A complex modular entity that truly feels as though it has a mind of its own, with countless advanced mechanics that will continue to be expanded upon drastically in future updates. You can find a spoiler with more information at the bottom of this page.

Shaders and dense biomes, like the redwoods from biomes o' plenty, are recommended in conjunction with this mod.

# More info + MC versions! ⚠️

This is a highly complex mod receiving frequent updates, so transferring the full description and all versions between sites is challenging. For the full mod details, see its Curseforge page here!: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obsessed
